signal_evidence: Between 2022-10-07 and 2022-10-07, the customer conducted 1 transaction(s) — predominantly card payments — amounting to approximately NPR 1,401,026.
The principal counterparties observed were Griffith, Jackson and Castaneda.
the velocity and aggregate value of the funds are not fully consistent with that profile.

noise_evidence: During the branch's periodic transaction-monitoring review, the compliance desk at PRIME examined the account held by Daniel Jenkins after an internal threshold alert was triggered.
This report is submitted out of an abundance of caution for the compliance unit's further analysis and does not, by itself, constitute a determination of wrongdoing.
